lead_profile_text: Already on short-let, switching from underperforming provider (MyProperty Host). Occupancy considerably down from last year — currently around break-even; should be hitting double in peak months (May–August). Operational failures: damage not reported to owner, account manager left with poor handover, guests waiting for keys, missed check-ins, key nest mismanaged. Potential second property (Burton-on-Trent) if interested.
emotional_profile: Actively motivated to leave MyProperty Host — operational failures have completely eroded trust. Straightforward switching play. High conversion probability once notice period with current provider is confirmed.
delay_trigger_phrases: Henry to review current contract for notice period
follow-up call to discuss transition timeline once contract reviewed
delay_timeline: Depends on MyProperty Host notice period — once confirmed, path to signing is clear
green_light_trigger_phrases: Should be hitting double in peak months

top_objections.text: What notice period is required by MyProperty Host? — needs to check contract before committing to transition timeline
top_objections.zac_response: Henry to review current contract; Zac to send key nest location search and follow-up call once notice period confirmed

top_objections.text: Income currently at break-even — needs to understand transition timeline before committing to new contract
top_objections.zac_response: Stayful projections: gross £25,636/year, net payout £13,331 (~£1,100/month) — strong improvement over current break-even state. Direct booking capability (26%) reduces platform dependency.

top_questions.text: What is the transition process from MyProperty Host to Stayful?
top_questions.answer: Review notice period with MyProperty Host, give notice, Stayful builds new listing and handles transition. Zac to send key nest location search.

top_questions.text: Can you also analyse the Burton-on-Trent property?
top_questions.answer: Noted as potential second property — analysis to be provided if interested

what_moved_them: Stayful's direct booking capability (26% rate) — reduces platform dependency vs MyProperty Host
Quarterly performance calls and dedicated Slack channel vs MyProperty Host's poor communication and account manager churn
Income projections showing ~£1,100/month net vs current break-even
Specific operational fixes: proper key nest management, direct check-in communications

conversion_gaps.gap: MyProperty Host notice period unknown — transition cannot be planned until confirmed
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Help Henry review his MyProperty Host contract and confirm notice period; plan transition timing against 31 May offer expiry

offer_framing: 13%+VAT if signed before 31 May 2026. Offer expiry creates urgency relative to notice period review timing.
